bird.name: Bay-breasted warbler
bird.summary: The bay-breasted warbler (Setophaga castanea) is a small species of songbird in the New World warbler family, Parulidae. It is one of 35 sp…

locations.name: 加拿大
locations.summary: 加拿大（英语、法语：Canada，英語：/ˈkænədə/，法語：[kanada]）是一個位于北美洲北部的国家，属于西半球及北半球，其领土西临太平洋，东濒大西洋，北接北冰洋，有部分领土位于北极圈内。加拿大东北方与丹麦领地格陵兰相望，並以漢…

locations.name: 美国
locations.summary: 美利堅合眾國（英語：United States of America，縮寫：USA），简称美国、美利堅（英語：America）或合眾國（United States，縮寫：US），是位於北美洲的聯邦制共和國。其由50個州、首都华盛顿哥伦比亚…

locations.name: 南美洲
locations.summary: 南亚美利加洲（英语：South America），简称南美洲，为七大洲之一，位於西半球南部（或南半球），西臨南太平洋，西面為太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊。太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊之間的內營力為張力，衍生了東太平洋海嶺；而納斯卡板塊與南美洲板塊的內…

locations.name: 加勒比地区
locations.summary: 加勒比地區（英語：Caribbean）是指加勒比海及其附近的區域。 定義 若依照聯合國地理分區裡的地理亞區來判定，加勒比地區的範圍為加勒比海上的諸島—西印度群島，國家與屬地包含安圭拉、安地卡及巴布達、阿魯巴、巴哈馬、巴貝多、博奈爾、聖佑達…

relations.subject: Bay-breasted warbler
relations.evidence: Bay-breasted warblers breed in the boreal spruce-fir forests of eastern and central Canada (Newfoundland, west to northeastern British Columbia), as well as the far northeast of the United States. The species winters in the wet lowland forests of northeastern South America, the Caribbean, and southern Central America, and may be seen during spring and fall migration across the eastern half of the United States in a variety of vegetative communities

relations.subject: Bay-breasted warbler
relations.evidence: Historically, though, the species has been slowly declining, with a loss of insect prey and global climate change contributing factors to decline
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
